titleStmt.title: SII 39.109: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 109. (A.R. No. 109 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH AND WEST TIERS OF THE SAME TEMPLE. ••••••••••

summary.p: This inscription records the list of persons viz., Vaḍatalaisembināṭṭu Arasapillai, Kāṭṭināyaṇārā's, mother Eḻugapperumāḷ, Āriyaṉ Taṅganārāyaṇa dēvaṉ who donated stones and pillars to the temple. Shri Āttabhaṭṭar, Sembināṭṭu Āḷuḍaiyāṉ and malaimaṇḍalattu Sundara Pāṇḍya-gauriyār paid cash as gift to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī muṉṟāṅkāl Oru cuṟṟu tattamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ
pi nallūr perumāṉ Atiravaca Āvoṉ kāṅkeyaṉ taṉmam
ṭaiyarṉ cekappaṭaik

vaṭatalaic cempi nāṭṭu Aracapiḷḷai ceyta kallumūṉṟu
tiruvirāmiśvarattu Āriyaṉ taṅka nārāyaṇa tevaṉ taṉmakallu Añcu §
kaṭṭi nāyaṉār tāyār Eḻukap perumāḷ taṉmam kallu Iraṇṭu §

koṅkip perumāḷ Āriyapaṭṭakaḷil Ātta
paṭṭar tanta paṇam pattu §

cempi nāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyāṉ tanta
paṇam pattu §

malaimaṇṭalattu cuntara
pāṇṭiya koḷariyār tanta pa
ṇam 10 5

virapāṇṭiya tevar malaiyāṉ mutalikaḷil periyāṉ pāntā
ṅkaṉāṉa vamutipaṉmar paṇam patiṉ Añcu §
Digital edition of SII 39.109 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
